headline: Settlement Clears Legal Overhang For Wabtec Locomotive Earnings Story
summary: Wabtec, formally Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (NYSE:WAB), and Progress Rail have reached a settlement in a significant legal dispute tied to their locomotive and components business. The agreement resolves ongoing proceedings that had raised questions for customers and suppliers in the freight locomotive sector. For you as an investor, the key point is that two major suppliers in freight locomotives have removed a legal overhang tied to core products and components. Wabtec, through...
